name: gods-celebrities
description: Unite 13 Adeota — Paystack payment integration with admin wallet & withdrawals

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const pub=path.join(__dirname,'public');const out=path.join(__dirname,'out');const files=['index.html','login.html','register.html','dashboard.html','payment.html','adeota-admin.html','application-form.html','style.css','app.js','firebase-config.js'];let ok=true;files.forEach(f=>{const fp=path.join(pub,f);if(!fs.existsSync(fp)){console.error('MISSING: '+f);ok=false;}else{console.log('OK: '+f);}});if(!ok)process.exit(1);if(!fs.existsSync(out))fs.mkdirSync(out,{recursive:true});files.forEach(f=>{const src=path.join(pub,f);if(fs.existsSync(src))fs.copyFileSync(src,path.join(out,f));});console.log('\\nBuild complete — assets copied to /out.');"
